title: Command Cockpit World Map Strip
summary: Added a compact world-map strip to the Command Cockpit Overview HUD so the selected money path shows its world, level, quest, proof, gate, and bot state before deeper scrolling.
changes: Derived six map nodes from lane realm, level progress, quest checkpoints, evidence, gate pressure, and owner bot.
Replaced the Overview HUD route row with a compact animated world-map strip only inside the Command Cockpit.
Contained the strip horizontally on narrow screens so new lanes and long labels do not create page overflow.
